# Awesome Skills Copilot — llms.txt
# Machine-readable index of all agents, skills, hooks, and plugins
# Compatible with GitHub Copilot, Claude Code, and other AI assistants

## Agents

- name: orchestrator | path: agents/orchestrator.agent.md | description: Single entry-point — delegates to planners and builders through mandatory quality chains
- name: planner | path: agents/planner.agent.md | description: Read-only planning with Gherkin ACs, delegation chain, estimates, and risks
- name: jira-planner | path: agents/jira-planner.agent.md | description: Jira read+write — Gherkin conversion, DoD checklists, sprint planning
- name: docs-planner | path: agents/docs-planner.agent.md | description: Jira + Confluence bridge planner with knowledge enrichment
- name: backend | path: agents/backend.agent.md | description: .NET CRUD code generator — Controller, Service, Repository, DTO, Mapping
- name: frontend | path: agents/frontend.agent.md | description: React + TypeScript + MUI component builder with hook patterns
- name: scaffold | path: agents/scaffold.agent.md | description: .NET microservice skeleton scaffolder
- name: reviewer | path: agents/reviewer.agent.md | description: 7-dimension code review with multi-model panel and auto-fix loop
- name: docs-writer | path: agents/docs-writer.agent.md | description: Confluence documentation writer with templates
- name: product-manual | path: agents/product-manual.agent.md | description: HTML product documentation generator
- name: backend-tests | path: agents/backend-tests.agent.md | description: NUnit + Moq test writer targeting 95% coverage
- name: frontend-tests | path: agents/frontend-tests.agent.md | description: Vitest + React Testing Library test writer targeting 90% coverage
- name: e2e-tests | path: agents/e2e-tests.agent.md | description: Cypress E2E test generator with strict POM
- name: playwright-e2e | path: agents/playwright-e2e.agent.md | description: Playwright E2E — cross-browser coverage, accessibility audits
- name: migration | path: agents/migration.agent.md | description: EF Core migration specialist — rollback-safe Up/Down
- name: k8s-deployer | path: agents/k8s-deployer.agent.md | description: Kubernetes manifest generator — Deployment, Service, Ingress, HPA, Kustomize
- name: k8s-troubleshoot | path: agents/k8s-troubleshoot.agent.md | description: Kubernetes cluster diagnostician — CrashLoopBackOff, OOMKilled, pending pods
- name: helm-engineer | path: agents/helm-engineer.agent.md | description: Helm 4 chart specialist — create, template, lint, package, OCI registry
- name: azure-deployer | path: agents/azure-deployer.agent.md | description: Azure infrastructure provisioning — AKS, ACR, Bicep, Terraform, azd CLI
- name: foundry-agent | path: agents/foundry-agent.agent.md | description: Microsoft Foundry Agent Service — prompt, workflow, hosted agents
- name: pipeline-engineer | path: agents/pipeline-engineer.agent.md | description: CI/CD pipeline generator — GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps, GitLab CI

## Skills

- name: acquire-codebase-knowledge | path: skills/acquire-codebase-knowledge/SKILL.md | description: Structured codebase exploration for onboarding
- name: code-review-pipeline | path: skills/code-review-pipeline/SKILL.md | description: Multi-model panel review system
- name: confluence-content-guide | path: skills/confluence-content-guide/SKILL.md | description: Confluence documentation structure templates
- name: conventional-commit | path: skills/conventional-commit/SKILL.md | description: Conventional Commits format enforcement
- name: create-adr | path: skills/create-adr/SKILL.md | description: Architectural Decision Record creation
- name: csharp-nunit | path: skills/csharp-nunit/SKILL.md | description: NUnit test templates for .NET services
- name: diagnose | path: skills/diagnose/SKILL.md | description: AI workflow health check
- name: doc-comments | path: skills/doc-comments/SKILL.md | description: XML doc / JSDoc comment generation
- name: dotnet-crud-scaffold | path: skills/dotnet-crud-scaffold/SKILL.md | description: .NET CRUD code templates
- name: dotnet-namespace-detect | path: skills/dotnet-namespace-detect/SKILL.md | description: .NET namespace auto-detection
- name: dotnet-quality-chain | path: skills/dotnet-quality-chain/SKILL.md | description: Backend quality chain — build, test, review
- name: explain-file | path: skills/explain-file/SKILL.md | description: Deep file analysis and dependency tracing
- name: gherkin-format | path: skills/gherkin-format/SKILL.md | description: Gherkin format rules G1-G11
- name: harness-creator | path: skills/harness-creator/SKILL.md | description: Project harness subsystem scaffolding
- name: jira-gherkin-convert | path: skills/jira-gherkin-convert/SKILL.md | description: Convert Jira tickets to Gherkin ACs
- name: jira-user-story-draft | path: skills/jira-user-story-draft/SKILL.md | description: Draft Jira user stories with Gherkin
- name: knowledge-init | path: skills/knowledge-init/SKILL.md | description: Living knowledge base builder
- name: lisec-doc-template | path: skills/lisec-doc-template/SKILL.md | description: HTML product documentation template
- name: performance-optimize | path: skills/performance-optimize/SKILL.md | description: Performance analysis for .NET and React
- name: playwright-test-gen | path: skills/playwright-test-gen/SKILL.md | description: Playwright test spec generation
- name: product-doc-gap-checker | path: skills/product-doc-gap-checker/SKILL.md | description: Documentation completeness auditor
- name: product-flow-screenshots | path: skills/product-flow-screenshots/SKILL.md | description: Automated screenshot flow generation
- name: react-crud-scaffold | path: skills/react-crud-scaffold/SKILL.md | description: React CRUD code templates
- name: react-quality-chain | path: skills/react-quality-chain/SKILL.md | description: Frontend quality chain — build, test, review
- name: react-vitest | path: skills/react-vitest/SKILL.md | description: Vitest + React Testing Library templates
- name: review-and-fix | path: skills/review-and-fix/SKILL.md | description: Fix-first code review
- name: security-review | path: skills/security-review/SKILL.md | description: OWASP-aligned security audit
- name: trace-bug | path: skills/trace-bug/SKILL.md | description: Structured root-cause analysis
- name: kubernetes-manifests | path: skills/kubernetes-manifests/SKILL.md | description: Production-ready K8s manifest templates
- name: helm-charts | path: skills/helm-charts/SKILL.md | description: Helm 4 chart scaffolding templates
- name: azure-infrastructure | path: skills/azure-infrastructure/SKILL.md | description: Bicep and Terraform IaC templates for Azure

## Hooks

- name: governance-audit | path: hooks/governance-audit/ | description: Session governance and audit logging
- name: knowledge-drift | path: hooks/knowledge-drift/ | description: Detects stale documentation
- name: secrets-scanner | path: hooks/secrets-scanner/ | description: Scans for leaked secrets in prompts
- name: session-logger | path: hooks/session-logger/ | description: Logs session activity and metrics
- name: tool-guardian | path: hooks/tool-guardian/ | description: Guards tool usage against policies

## Plugins

- name: fullstack-dotnet-react | path: plugins/fullstack-dotnet-react/ | description: Full-stack .NET + React development bundle
- name: testing-suite | path: plugins/testing-suite/ | description: Complete testing toolkit — unit, integration, E2E
- name: planning-suite | path: plugins/planning-suite/ | description: Planning, review, and documentation bundle
- name: devops-cloud | path: plugins/devops-cloud/ | description: DevOps and cloud infrastructure — K8s, Helm, Azure, Foundry, CI/CD
